channel.title: dout.dev - making-of
channel.description: RSS feed for posts tagged with making-of

item.title: Pi and DeepSeek V4 Flash: The Daily Coding Loop That Costs Almost Nothing
Vibe Coding With Rigor (Or: How to Use AI Without Your Codebase Turning Into a Dumpster Fire)
item.description: The term I am reclaiming (because "vibe coding" got a bad rap)

item.title: CI/CD Around GitHub Pages (Or: How I Got Deploy Previews Without Paying Netlify)
item.description: The gap GitHub Pages leaves open (it's not that bad)

item.title: Quality Gate: Linting, Formatting, and Verify (Or: How I Stopped Shipping Broken HTML)
item.description: Why the gate exists (because you will ship shit if you don't)

item.title: SEO Metadata Without Rituals (Or: I Read 47 SEO Blog Posts So You Don't Have To)
item.description: The short version (TL;DR for the impatient)

item.title: OG Images at Build Time (Or: How I Stopped Worrying and Learned to Love Sharp)
item.description: The problem and the usual solutions (none of which I wanted)

item.title: Feeds and Sitemaps at Build Time (RSS Is Dead, Long Live RSS. Also JSON Feed.)
item.description: The distribution minimum (three files, that's it)

item.title: Build Assets Pipeline (Or: How I Turned a Simple Blog Into an Image Processing Factory)
Design Tokens Before Pages (Yes, I Wrote the CSS Before the First Line of HTML)
item.description: The mistake I kept making (repeat after me: tokens first)

item.title: Progressive Enhancement as Contract (Yes, It Works Without JS. No, I'm Not Kidding.)
Archives, Tags, Months, and Series (Or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Pagination)
item.description: Three ways to slice the same posts (because one axis is never enough)

item.title: Template Engine and Template Structure (Or: Why I Didn't Use Handlebars Like a Normal Person)
item.description: Three constraints that shaped the grammar (because constraints are good, actually)

item.title: Custom SSG Pipeline: From Markdown to Static HTML (Without Losing Your Mind)
item.description: The pipeline, in one picture (because I know you're skimming)

item.title: Why I Skipped Astro, Eleventy and Next.js (And Built My Own SSG Like a Goddamn Caveman)
item.description: The default answer and why I ignored it

item.title: Rebuilding dout.dev With an AI Copilot: Less Boilerplate, Same Amount of Existential Dread
CMS and Markdown Processing (Or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Flat File)
How I Built dout.dev (and why I did not use a framework like a normal person)
item.description: What the stack is, exactly (TL;DR: files + Node + blood)
